title: Amethyst tools and more
description: This project adds a full set of, Amethyst tools, weapons, and armor to Minecraft.
body:
## Amethyst tools and More

****AmethystToolsAndMore**** is a Fabric mod that introduces a powerful new tier of equipment crafted from Amethyst Cluster, providing a sleek and fast alternative for late-game survival.

### Features
This mod adds a comprehensive set of Amethyst Cluster-based gear to the game:

****Standard Tools:**** High-speed Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe.

****Combat Weapons:**** A sharp Amethyst Sword and a unique Amethyst Spear featuring custom stabbing animations.

****Protective Armor:**** A full suit of Amethyst Armor, including Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots.

****Specialty Items:**** Amethyst Horse Armor and Amethyst Nautilus Armor for your companions and utility.

****Special Ability:**** Illuminates the surroundings like a lantern when the full armor set is worn.


### Why download this mod?
The standout feature of all Amethyst equipment in this mod is its High-speed. Your tools and armor will break fast but are highly enchantable, making them the perfect choice for mining special blocks, like obsidian. With speed and efficiency stats that provide a meaningful upgrade over standard materials, it offers both a functional advantage and a premium violet aesthetic.

### Technical Information
- Loader: Fabric
- Minecraft Version: Optimized for 26.1+
- Dependencies: Requires the Fabric API to be installed.
